overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through a rain-soaked neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The player navigates through wet streets illuminated by teal and magenta neon signs, stops at a red light behind a yellow car, and continues through commercial districts with various storefronts and pedestrians.

rain-soaked multi-lane road reflecting neon lights from surrounding buildings
tall commercial structure with large illuminated advertising screens
concrete overpass structure spanning across the road ahead
multi-story building with teal and pink neon lighting accents

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a vehicle driving through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street at night. The dashboard HUD glows red while the wet asphalt reflects the surrounding neon lights. The vehicle approaches an intersection beneath an elevated highway overpass, with commercial buildings lining both sides of the wide multi-lane road.

events.description: vehicle comes to a complete stop behind a yellow sedan at a red traffic light
traffic light changes and vehicle begins moving forward through the intersection
vehicle makes a right turn onto a narrower commercial street

agents.ego_description: stopped at a red light behind a yellow car, then proceeding through the intersection and turning right

notable_agents.action: yellow sedan stopped at red light ahead, then moving forward through the intersection

entered.detail: distinctive yellow car with horizontal red taillights stopped at the intersection
traffic signal showing red, commanding vehicles to stop
building facade featuring a large illuminated mural of a geisha face

segments.scene_description: The vehicle slows to a stop behind a yellow sedan at a red traffic light in an urban intersection. After waiting, the light changes and the vehicle proceeds forward, making a right turn past a building featuring a prominent geisha mural. The wet crosswalk markings are visible as the vehicle navigates the turn onto a new street.

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrower commercial street, passing pedestrians and parked vehicles

entered.detail: tighter urban street lined with shops and neon signage on both sides
people walking along the wet sidewalks near commercial entrances

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through a narrower commercial street lined with neon-lit storefronts and pedestrians on the sidewalks. The environment feels more enclosed than the previous wide intersection, with various shops and billboards visible. Pedestrians can be seen walking along the wet pavements as the vehicle continues through this commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with underpass and parking areas

events.description: entering a covered underpass or tunnel-like structure with concrete walls
exiting the underpass back into open street with elevated highway visible

agents.ego_description: driving through an underpass and continuing through mixed urban infrastructure with various turns

rough concrete surfaces lining the sides of the underpass
cars parked along the side of the street near commercial entrances
open intersection with elevated highway structure visible overhead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes through a covered underpass with concrete walls creating a more enclosed, darker environment, then emerges back into an open intersection with an elevated highway overpass visible. The surroundings include parked vehicles and various commercial storefronts as the vehicle navigates through this mixed urban infrastructure.

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive through the cyberpunk city streets, passing various neon signs and commercial buildings

notable_agents.action: person standing on the sidewalk near a building entrance

entered.detail: tall structures with extensive teal and pink neon lighting along the facades
multiple illuminated signs and advertisements in various colors

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle continuing through the rain-soaked cyberpunk city, passing by buildings covered in vibrant neon signage. The street features crosswalk markings and occasional pedestrians on the sidewalks. The environment maintains the dense urban atmosphere with commercial buildings lining both sides of the road as the drive continues through the night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city, transitioning from wide urban intersections into enclosed commercial corridors and back into the open night. It begins inside a vehicle moving beneath an elevated highway overpass, where a red HUD glows against the reflection of neon lights on wet asphalt. As the vehicle slows to a stop behind a yellow sedan at a red light, the scene shifts forward with a right turn past a prominent geisha mural and across wet crosswalks. The camera then enters a narrower commercial district lined with vibrant storefronts and pedestrians before passing through a dark, concrete underpass that briefly constricts the view. Finally, the vehicle emerges back into an open intersection, continuing past dense rows of neon-lit buildings and parked cars under the persistent city rain.
